name: Glimpse of Flames
descs:
Turn End: consume half of [Combustion] Count on enemies with [Combustion] to deal ([Combustion] Potency x consumed [Combustion] Count) bonus Wrath damage. (can consume up to 5 [Combustion] Count)

Targets lose ([Combustion] Count consumed by Glimpse of Flames) Defense Levels for the next turn. (max 3)

Turn End: consume half of [Combustion] Count on enemies with [Combustion] to deal ([Combustion] Potency x consumed [Combustion] Count) bonus Wrath damage. <style="upgradeHighlight">(can consume up to 7 [Combustion] Count)</style>

Turn End: consume half of [Combustion] Count on enemies with [Combustion] to deal ([Combustion] Potency x consumed [Combustion] Count) bonus Wrath damage. <style="upgradeHighlight">(can consume up to 10 [Combustion] Count)</style>

Targets lose ([Combustion] Count consumed by Glimpse of Flames) Defense Levels for the next turn. <style="upgradeHighlight">(max 8)</style>
